summary: Test suite covers main policies (max-age-days, keep-latest, max-total-size), basic error cases, dry-run mode, and policy combinations with good fixture setup and clear test names. Significant gaps: no tests for help output, argument value validation (e.g., --max-age-days with non-numeric), edge cases (zero values, boundary timestamps, artifacts with tied creation times), comment-line handling (#-prefixed input), multiple workflows in specific policy scenarios, or exact output format validation. Assertions use substring matching which is reasonable but not precise enough to catch subtle format regressions. Missing tests for the workflow/act execution requirements mentioned in the task (all tests should run through GitHub Actions via act). For edge case rigor: no tests for behavior at exact age cutoff, all artifacts from same workflow, or very large numbers. Structure is solid with setup/teardown and helper functions, but would miss regressions in boundary conditions and special cases.
